creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Max Brazhnikov from comment #1)
> Looks like devel/py-pythran is having a problem.
After the update of devel/py-pythran to v0.11.0 in [1], the problem seems to be solved, at least on my CURRENT boxes and in my Poudriere :)

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=59c482862373137095b025c65273cfb1c8be1fb0
